description_long: This object is a bolt-action rifle with a long, straight wooden stock and a dark metal receiver and barrel assembly. The stock appears to be made from a single piece of wood, showing a natural brown grain pattern, and extends nearly the full length of the rifle. The metal components, including the barrel, bolt, and trigger guard, are finished in a matte black or dark gray, contrasting with the wood. The rifle features a simple iron sight system and lacks any visible scope or advanced optics. The magazine is not externally visible, suggesting an internal magazine design. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments, suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A bolt-action rifle with a long wooden stock and dark metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel end and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden stock and the metal receiver, with the bolt and trigger guard visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the width of the stock and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the rifle and the bolt handle protruding from the receiver.
